<!-- Thanks for contributing! Filling this in helps reviewers move quickly. -->

## Summary

<!-- What does this change do, and why? Reference issues with `Closes #123`. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] feat — new user-visible behavior
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] docs — documentation only
- [ ] chore / ci — tooling, build, dependencies
- [ ] refactor — no behavior change
- [ ] test — adding or refactoring tests

## Checklist

- [ ] Commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] `ruff check`, `ruff format --check`, `mypy --strict src/ovispect`, and `pytest` all pass locally
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]` (for user-visible changes)
- [ ] Documentation updated (README, CONTRIBUTING, env-var table) if applicable
- [ ] No secrets, real IP addresses, or client certificates included in code, fixtures, or screenshots

## Breaking changes

<!-- If this PR introduces a breaking change, describe the migration path here.
     Otherwise delete this section. -->

## Screenshots / output

<!-- For UI changes, attach a before/after screenshot. For backend changes,
     paste the relevant log or response output. -->
